text:
9 = Not Applicable 

COMMENT: This field is retired in 2023 and no longer appears in the plan base file. The CCW constructs the plan 
characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to CMS’s Health Plan Management 
System (HPMS). 

Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) plans are waived from 
reporting plan benefit package information. 

For those plans that did not report, the value of this variable will be blank.
